source: Curated PA EIT seed table — top PSD codes hardcoded from publicly known rates (2026 effective). Full refresh via scripts/refresh_pa_eit.py loads DCED Tax Register XLS into .planning/locals-data/pa_eit_full.json for override.
notes: Philadelphia is outside Act 32; rates are Philly wage tax (separate). Resident: 3.75%, Nonresident: 3.44% (2026).
Rates here are decimal (0.01 = 1%). LST in whole dollars/year.

`nonresident` = rate withheld if employee works in this municipality but lives elsewhere. `resident` = rate for residents regardless of work location. Act 32: withhold max(resident-rate-of-home, nonresident-rate-of-work).

fallback.note: For PSDs not in this seed, assume 1% resident / 1% nonresident. This is PA's minimum rate for most municipalities. Override with refresh script for accuracy.
